settings.heading: Custom apparel fundraisers built around your group and deadline.
settings.lead: Turn shirts, hoodies and spirit wear into a clear fundraising campaign for schools, teams, churches and community organizations.
settings.body:
L F Graphco helps fundraising groups choose apparel, organize artwork details and request pricing with enough information to move quickly. Use a fundraiser page for booster clubs, school clubs, youth groups, churches, sports teams and local causes.

Send the group name, quantity goal, apparel ideas and deadline to get started.
settings.features: School Fundraisers,Church Groups,Booster Clubs,Team Apparel,Campaign Deadlines

settings.heading: Get the apparel idea reviewed before promoting it.
settings.intro: A quote-ready mockup conversation helps your group understand product options, artwork placement and starting pricing before launch.

settings.heading: Fundraisers can combine shirts, hoodies, polos and promo items.
settings.intro: Use screen printing, embroidery, DTF and branded products to build a campaign people can understand quickly.

settings.heading: Start the fundraiser quote.
settings.intro: Send the group name, project type, quantity and due date. L F Graphco will help you move toward a usable quote.
